title: helianthemum citrinum
intro: Helianthemum citrinum, also known as Rockrose or Golden Rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Cistaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The health benefits of Helianthemum citrinum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum citrinum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
